tagline: Designing Spaces That Stand the Test of Time
hero_subtitle: Newton-based architecture studio delivering thoughtful residential, commercial, and institutional design across Greater Boston.
service_area_description: Serving Newton, Brookline, Wellesley, Needham, and the Greater Boston metro area.
seo_title: Legacy Architecture Studio | Architecture Firm in Newton, MA
seo_description: Legacy Architecture Studio in Newton, MA. Thoughtful residential, commercial, and institutional design for Greater Boston communities. Call (617) 527-3300.
services_subtitle: From concept to completion, we bring vision, precision, and craft to every project.
reviews_subtitle: Homeowners, developers, and institutions across Greater Boston trust Legacy for projects that matter.
cta_subtitle: Schedule a free consultation. We'll discuss your project goals and outline a clear design path forward.
footer_description: Newton-based architecture studio specializing in residential, commercial, and institutional design across Greater Boston.

services_featured.name: Residential Architecture
services_featured.description: Custom homes, renovations, and additions designed with craft and attention to how you actually live. Every detail considered.

services_secondary.name: Commercial Design
services_secondary.description: Office spaces, retail environments, and mixed-use projects that balance aesthetics with functionality and code compliance.

services_accent.name: Institutional Projects
services_accent.description: Schools, libraries, and community buildings designed for durability, accessibility, and civic pride.

services_wide.name: Historic Renovation
services_wide.description: Sensitive restoration and adaptive reuse of historic properties. Preserving character while meeting modern performance standards.

about_features.title: Design Excellence
about_features.description: Every project receives the same level of care and creativity, whether it's a kitchen renovation or a new institutional building.

about_features.title: Newton Roots
about_features.description: Locally based and deeply familiar with Greater Boston's building codes, historic districts, and architectural character.

about_features.title: Collaborative Process
about_features.description: We work closely with clients from first sketch to final walkthrough. Your input drives the design at every stage.

reviews.name: Homeowner
reviews.text: Legacy transformed our 1920s colonial into a modern family home without losing any of its original charm. Their attention to detail is extraordinary.

reviews.name: Developer
reviews.text: Professional, responsive, and creative. They delivered construction documents on schedule and the project sailed through permitting.

reviews.name: School Administrator
reviews.text: The renovation of our school building was handled with incredible sensitivity to the students and staff. The finished space is beautiful and functional.
